name: Sassy Jack Cheese Bites
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Low fat jalapeno jack cheese -- shredded
1 pinch Salt, or herbal salt sub
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a large cookie sheet with waxed paper.
2. In a bowl, combine all ingredients.
3. Shape mixture into 1/2 inch balls and place on cookie sheet; do not let balls touch each other.
4. Freeze until hard.
5. Preheat oven to 450 degrees F (230 degrees C).
6. Place cheese balls on an ungreased cookie sheet and bake for 10-12 minutes.
7. Serve hot.
Per cheese ball: 30 calories, 1.5g protein, 2g fat, 2g carbohydrate, 5mg cholesterol, 36mg sodium, 0 fiber.
